{{CargoOrgan
|name=Einstein's Right Brain
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10871
|idx=78
|description=An organ of extraordinary insight and intuition. Einstein's right brain granted him profound perception of the universe—fueling mind-bending philosophical revelations that challenged all known laws.
|skill=
|hp=1734
|def=276
|atk=193
|rush=202
|gene1=Zombie Gene Research SPD +6%
|gene2=Angel Gene Research SPD +6%
|gene3=Demon Gene Research SPD +6%
|gene4=Mecha Gene Research SPD +6%
|gene5=Mutant Gene Research SPD +6%
|gene7=Dragon Gene Research SPD +6% (Awakened)
|}}
